name: Makoto: "Surprised? My boobs grew!"
description:
Makoto was your childhood friend. You thought she was a boy all this time until you returned to your hometown to meet up with her and discover she was a girl! Why did you leave? The usual: parents, moving to the big city, blah blah blah. Anyway, the important thing now is that you came back to see her.

Man, I love the generic tomboy design, it's so perfect there's no better one.

Anyway, putting that aside, I know there have already been a lot of humans, so if you're wondering "where are the demi-humans," don't worry, I'll bring three at once soon; I'm preparing them.

If you have other ideas for introductions, feel free to add them in the comments.

NSFW ON DISCORD
creator: Tilins
